data.name: Milfy Cases: Damsels in Distress
data.detailed_description:
Milfy Cases：陷入困境的少女
Scott Thunderstone（可自訂姓名）是學院的應屆畢業生，他正在執行一項任務，追尋並找回一件魔法神器。

抵達希望泉小鎮後，Scott 遇到了他的新搭檔 McBrighton 偵探，當時他正在調查溫思羅普莊園的一起入室盜竊案。

Mary Winthrope 遇到了 Scott，發現他還沒有在鎮上找到住處，於是邀請他住在莊園裡。
她的女僕 Sally 和 Alice 也出現了，並在 Scott 調查案件時以不同的方式分散他的注意力。
他能找到失蹤的神器並追蹤到一名叛變特工嗎？在這部都市奇幻視覺小說中尋找答案。

當你扮演 Scott 的角色時，你將做出與喜劇、攻擊性和探究相關的選擇，同時還能獲得遊戲成就、解鎖背景故事，並探索這個正在開發中的激動人心的故事的第一幕。

《熟女案：落難少女》的計畫：
豐富細緻的故事線，可供探索，各種選擇將影響劇情發展。
清晰精美的高清畫質。
音樂和音效，提升遊戲體驗。
30FPS 動畫 - 成人和非成人。
全動畫成人場景，並附有情色音效，提升遊戲體驗。
戀物癖/計畫標籤 - 單人、男女、男女/女/女、男女/女、女/女/女、女同性戀、口交、後宮、陰道、肛交、群交、潮吹、玩具、偷窺、打屁股、支配、墮落、幽默、第一人稱視角、懷孕。
四個美好結局，分別對應三個愛情故事，以及一個後宮結局。

data.short_description: 《Milfy Cases》是一款充滿選擇驅動的成人視覺小說，充滿了現代冒險的精彩元素。在這部都市奇幻小說中，你將主動出擊，與美麗的女性談情說愛，收集傳說，並透過約會、愛情和性愛等方式解開核心謎團。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 法文, 繁體中文, 義大利文, 荷蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 土耳其文, 德文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista or Higher
  • 處理器: 2.0ghz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Only

  • 處理器: 2.0ghz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

data.name: Milfy Cases: Damsels in Distress
data.detailed_description:
Milfy Cases: Damsels in Distress
A recent graduate of The Academy, Scott Thunderstone (name customizable) is on a mission to track down and recover a magical artifact in the small town of Hope Springs.

On arrival, Scott meets his new partner, Detective McBrighton, while on a case investigating a burglary at the Winthrope Manor. Mary Winthrope meets Scott and discovers he has yet to secure lodging in town, inviting him to stay at the manor. Her maids, Sally and Alice, both make an entrance, and pose different kinds of distraction for Scott while he's on the case.

Will he be able to find the missing artifact and track down a rogue agent? Find out in this urban fantasy visual novel.

As you take the role of Scott, you will make choices that tie to comedy, aggression, and inquiry, as well as earn in game achievements, unlock lore, and explore the the first act of this exciting story in development.

What's planned for Milfy Cases: Damsels in Distress:

  • A rich, detailed story line to explore with choices that influence the story.

  • Crisp, beautiful images rendered in glorious HD.

  • Music and sound effects that deepen the experience.

  • 30FPS animations - both adult and nonadult.

  • Fully animated adult scenes with erotic sound effects that enhance the experience.

  • Fetishes / planned tags - F solo, M/F, M/F/F, F/F, F/F/F, lesbian, oral, harem, vaginal, anal, group, squirt, toys, voyeurism, spanking, domination, corruption, humor, first person POV, pregnancy).

  • Four Good Endings, one with each of the three love interests, and a harem ending as well.

data.short_description: Milfy Cases is a choice-driven adult visual novel filled with the best parts of a modern day adventure. Take the initiative in this urban fantasy to romance gorgeous women, collect lore, and solve the central mystery with dating, love, and sex along the way.
data.supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain, French, Traditional Chinese, Italian, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Turkish, German
